docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MORA, PATRICK I AKA PATRICK MORA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-24-2012

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MORA, PATRICK I. HEARING SET FOR JUN-06-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MORA, PATRICK I.
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT MORA, PATRICK I.

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-06-2012 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT PATRICK MORA'S APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 CONTINUED FROM JUN-06-2012 TO MASTER CALENDAR MOTION AT JUN-20-2012, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 PER REQUEST OF THE APPLICANT. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-20-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PATRICK MORA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. FEES NOT PAID. GENERAL DENIAL OF DEFENDANT PATRICK I MORA FILED ON 5/16/12 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
